question: The chart shows browser usage share by product. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Chrome has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Safari has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Firefox accounts for more than 15% of the total.
options.D: Edge has the smallest market share.

explanation: From the labels, Safari has the highest share (54%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Safari is largest when relying on visual comparison.
